overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through Night City. The clip begins in a narrow teal-lit corridor, transitions through a foggy passage, and emerges into a hazy orange-lit urban street with neon signs. The player character navigates crosswalks, narrow alleys with holographic ads, and sidewalks alongside elevated train tracks during a dusty sunset atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow teal-lit corridor with industrial elements

entered.detail: tall metal storage racks with boxes
political campaign poster with 'VOTE PERALEZ' text
weathered green painted bench against the wall
metal pipes and railings along the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed corridor with teal artificial lighting. Industrial metal shelving and a green bench line the walls, with a political poster visible ahead. The camera moves forward steadily toward a bright exit at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: fog-filled narrow passage with overhead bridge

events.description: lighting shifts from teal to greenish fog as camera approaches the bright exit

agents.ego_description: moving through a foggy corridor toward the bright exit light

entered.detail: graffiti-covered concrete walls of the narrow passage
metal walkway bridge spanning overhead between buildings
walls covered in spray paint and urban art

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a fog-filled narrow alley with graffiti-covered walls. An overhead walkway bridge is visible above as the lighting shifts to a greenish hue from the intense exit glow ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow crosswalk and neon signage

events.description: exits narrow alley into open urban street with orange lighting and hazy atmosphere
waits at crosswalk as vehicle passes, then crosses the street with pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk, then crossing the street while navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on approaches and passes through the intersection
pedestrian with red hair and cat-ear hat standing at crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: asphalt road with yellow lane markings and crosswalk stripes
broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing
large red industrial dumpster on the sidewalk
tall buildings covered in illuminated advertisements and neon lights
tall poles with overhead lighting and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into a hazy orange-lit urban intersection. The camera approaches a yellow crosswalk, waits for a car to pass, then crosses the street alongside other pedestrians. Neon signs illuminate the buildings while street lights cast a warm glow through the dust-filled air.

events.description: enters narrow covered alley with teal door frame and red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past holographic ads and entering a narrow passage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the camera in the narrow alley

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying thermal paste advertisement
concrete stairs leading up to a building entrance
doorway illuminated with bright teal neon lights
vertical red neon lighting along the alley wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with holographic advertisements, the camera passes a building entrance with stairs. The scene transitions into a narrow covered alley featuring a teal neon door frame and red neon light strips along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with red neon leading to train tracks

events.description: exits narrow alley into open area with elevated train tracks and industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow alley toward the open train yard area

entered.detail: elevated railway tracks running through the industrial district
tall factory chimneys emitting smoke against the orange sky
overhead electrical wires and utility poles
massive screen displaying advertisements above the tracks

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow passage with red neon lighting, emerging into an open industrial area with elevated train tracks. Large digital billboards and power lines frame the view, with industrial smokestacks visible against the hazy orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside train tracks with hotel and neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk parallel to the train tracks, passing the hotel

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: multi-story building with illuminated 'HOTEL' signage
bright pink neon sign spelling HOTEL in English and Japanese
metal safety railing along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a curved sidewalk beside elevated train tracks, the camera passes a hotel with bright pink neon signage. The hazy orange sky dominates the background as sparse pedestrians walk along the path, and the industrial buildings continue along the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, teal-lit industrial corridor into the hazy, neon-drenched streets of a futuristic city. It begins by moving steadily past metal shelving and a green bench toward a bright exit, which leads directly into a fog-filled alley characterized by graffiti-covered walls and an overhead walkway. As the camera emerges from the alley, the environment opens into a wide urban intersection where the lighting shifts to a dusty orange glow, guiding the viewer across a yellow crosswalk amidst pedestrians and glowing neon signs. The scene then transitions along a commercial sidewalk lined with holographic advertisements before turning into a narrow covered alley defined by a teal neon door frame and red light strips.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit corridor into a sprawling industrial cityscape under a hazy sunset. It begins by pushing through a narrow passage bathed in red neon light, which quickly opens up into a wide industrial zone framed by power lines and towering smokestacks. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal large digital billboards set against a dominant orange sky. The scene then shifts to a curved sidewalk running alongside elevated train tracks, passing a hotel marked by bright pink neon signage. Finally, the movement continues past sparse pedestrians and industrial buildings, deepening the immersion into the dusty, urban atmosphere.
